title: Notification constituting the National Company Law Tribunal and National Company Law Appellate Tribunal under Sections 408 and 410 respectively of the Companies Act, 2013
description: Notification constituting the National Company Law Tribunal and National Company Law Appellate Tribunal under Sections 408 and 410 respectively of the Companies Act, 2013
text: 2779 GI/2016 (1) jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 1339] ubZ fnYyh] cq/okj] twu 1] 2016@T;s"B 11] 1938 No. 1339] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, JUNE 1, 2016/ JYAISTHA 11, 1938 कारपोरे ट कायᭅ मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 1 जून, 2016 का.आ. 1932(अ).—कᱶᮤीय सरकार, कंपनी अिधिनयम, 2013 (2013 का 18) कᳱ धा रा 408 ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए रा᳦ीय कंपनी िविध अिधकरण का ऐस ी शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग और कृ᭜यᲂ का िनवᭅहन करने के िलए, जो उᲦ अिधिनयम ᳇ारा या उसके अधीन उसे ᮧदᱫ कᳱ जाती है या कᳱ जाएं, का 1 जून, 2016 से गठन करती है। [फा. सं. ए-45011/14/2016- ᮧशा. IV] ᮧीतम ᳲसह, अपर सिचव MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st June, 2016 S.O. 1932(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 408 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), the Central Government hereby constitutes the National Company Law Tribunal to exercise and discharge the powers and functions as are, or may be, conferred on it by or under the said Act with effect from the 1st day of June, 2016. [F. No. A-45011/14/2016-Ad. IV] PRITAM SINGH, Addl. Secy. -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 1 जून, 2016 का.आ. 1933(अ).—कᱶᮤीय सरकार, कंपनी अिधिनयम, 2013 (2013 का 18) कᳱ धा रा 410 ᳇ारा ᮧद᭜त शि᭍तयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए रा᳦ीय कंपनी िविध अिधकरण के आदेशᲂ के िवᱧ᳍ अपीलᲂ कᳱ सुनवाई के िलए, 1 जून, 2016 से रा᳦ीय कंपनी िविध अपील अिधकरण का गठन कर ती है । [फा. सं. ए-45011/14/2016- ᮧशा. IV] ᮧीतम ᳲसह, अपर सिचव NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st June, 2016 S.O. 1933(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 410 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), the Central Government hereby constitutes the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal for hearing appeals against the orders of the National Company Law Tribunal with effect from the 1st day of June, 2016. [F. No. A-45011/14/2016-Ad. IV] PRITAM SINGH, Addl. Secy. Uploaded by the Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
